description: Seed library of real corporate transformation cases. Each case captures both promised and actual outcomes where known, with sources. Used as empirical prior in Monte Carlo simulation.

transformation.description: Replace customer-facing booking website and mobile app with modern platform built by Accenture

cases.tacit_notes: Project never delivered. Vendor risk on customer-facing replatform under fixed-scope contract.

transformation.description: Replace legacy inventory with SAP S/4HANA eLWIS

cases.tacit_notes: Tried to keep unique inventory-by-purchase-price model in SAP standard ERP. Customization spiral.

transformation.description: SAP ERP rollout following Elizabeth Arden acquisition

cases.tacit_notes: SEC investigation triggered. Mid-size firm took on big-firm ERP scope during M&A.

transformation.description: Build Predix industrial IoT platform

sources.title: Forbes: How GE's Digital strategy failed

cases.tacit_notes: Trying to build a platform play without consumer-tech DNA. Sold to Wabtec for fraction of investment.

transformation.description: 737 MAX redesign with MCAS software

cases.tacit_notes: 346 dead. Demonstrates that 'do it faster and cheaper' has a hard floor.

transformation.description: Maersk Spot platform - instant container booking

cases.tacit_notes: Reached target by year 3. 40% cost overrun but real success.

transformation.description: Acquire and integrate Flipkart

cases.tacit_notes: Strategic foothold gained. Indian FDI rules changed mid-flight.

transformation.description: Pizza Tracker, online ordering, mobile app

cases.tacit_notes: Stock $3 to $400+. Fixed product first (pizza recipe), then digital.

transformation.description: Launch 124 stores in Canada in 18 months

cases.tacit_notes: Item-level data wrong from day one. Pulled out of Canada in 2015.

transformation.description: Mobile Order & Pay with rewards

cases.tacit_notes: 20% of US transactions via Mobile Order within 2 years.

transformation.description: Convert HQ to Spotify-style squads/tribes/chapters/guilds

cases.tacit_notes: Everyone reapplied for their job. 30% of leadership left.

transformation.description: Pivot to Windows Phone via Microsoft alliance

sources.title: Nokia and the burning platform memo

cases.tacit_notes: Sold to Microsoft for $7B in 2014.

transformation.description: TradeLens - blockchain-based global shipping platform

cases.tacit_notes: Competitors refused to join Maersk-controlled platform. Killed 2022. Lesson: industry-wide platforms cannot be owned by one major player.

transformation.description: Fresh & Easy convenience grocery chain in California

cases.tacit_notes: Brits assumed US consumers wanted UK convenience format. Wrong.

transformation.description: BEES B2B platform for small retailers to order beer

cases.tacit_notes: Digital touch on existing distribution = winner. No fresh stack from scratch.

transformation.description: MindSphere industrial IoT cloud platform (Siemens answer to Predix)

sources.title: Reuters: Siemens spins off Digital Industries Software

cases.tacit_notes: Industrial giant tried same mistake as GE. Same outcome.

transformation.description: Build SberEcosystem - food delivery, taxi, healthcare, telecom

cases.tacit_notes: Core SberOnline = world-class banking app. Non-banking ecosystem bled cash. Sanctions accelerated wind-down.

transformation.description: Build branchless digital-only bank from scratch

cases.tacit_notes: Greenfield + smartphone timing. Cost-to-income ratio half of incumbents. Rare overperform case.

transformation.description: eGov.kz - digital government services portal

cases.tacit_notes: Strong top-down mandate enabled fast rollout. 80%+ of services now digital.

transformation.description: Yandex Taxi expansion to CIS, Eastern Europe, Africa

cases.tacit_notes: Won in Russia/CIS but stalled in Europe. Acquisition of Uber Russia was the strategic win.

transformation.description: Business Standards - consolidate finance/HR/IT across markets

cases.tacit_notes: Slow and unglamorous but delivered. Boring operational transformations have higher success rate than tech-led ones.

transformation.description: Cloud + AI transformation across consumer and corporate banking

cases.tacit_notes: Outspends entire fintech industry on tech. Scale wins.

transformation.description: 3G Capital zero-based budgeting + brutal cost cuts

cases.tacit_notes: Cost-cutting alone destroyed long-term brand value. Margin up short-term, business down long-term.

transformation.description: Bharti-Walmart JV cash-and-carry wholesale chain

cases.tacit_notes: Regulatory shifts + JV control issues. Eventually entered India via Flipkart acquisition instead.

transformation.description: Fire Phone - smartphone with 3D dynamic perspective

cases.tacit_notes: Bezos pet project. Inventory writedown ~$170M. Demonstrates founder-led companies need internal devil's advocates.

transformation.description: Invest in Rivian + joint EV truck program

cases.tacit_notes: Wrote down Rivian stake by $3B over 2022-2023. Joint program cancelled. Cautionary tale on strategic minority investments.

transformation.description: Acquire Time Warner for $85B to become media+telecom giant

sources.title: Reuters: AT&T spins off WarnerMedia at huge loss

cases.tacit_notes: Classic vertical-integration-in-media disaster. Spun off WarnerMedia 4 years later. $47B effective writedown. Lesson: cultural fit > strategic logic in M&A.

transformation.description: Launch 4G-only network nationwide with free voice and ultra-cheap data

sources.title: FT: How Reliance Jio rewrote Indian telecom

cases.tacit_notes: 350M subscribers in 4 years. Killed weak competitors, forced Airtel/Vodafone-Idea consolidation. Greenfield + price war strategy.

transformation.description: M-Pesa mobile money platform launched in Kenya

cases.tacit_notes: Now 30M+ users, 50%+ of Kenya's GDP flows through it. Demonstrates that emerging markets can leapfrog Western fintech.

transformation.description: MTS ecosystem - bank, cloud, OTT, IoT around telecom core

cases.tacit_notes: Same playbook as Sber. MTS Bank worked, other units bled cash. Sanctions hurt.

transformation.description: National Programme for IT - unify NHS England patient records

sources.title: UK National Audit Office NPfIT review

cases.tacit_notes: Largest civilian IT failure in history. Cancelled 2011. Lesson: do not impose national systems top-down on professionals who weren't consulted.

transformation.description: HealthCare.gov - ACA insurance marketplace launch

cases.tacit_notes: First weeks were catastrophic - site barely worked. Recovered by Q2 2014 after emergency surge team. Lesson: government IT can recover from launch disasters with the right people.

transformation.description: Acquire Aetna for $70B - vertical integration of pharmacy+insurance

cases.tacit_notes: Synergies materializing slowly. Health-Hub clinic concept rolled back in 2024.

transformation.description: Beyond Petroleum rebrand + renewables push

cases.tacit_notes: Deepwater Horizon 2010 killed the narrative. Sold most renewables assets by 2013. Returned to 'BP' branding.

transformation.description: 4IR initiative - AI, IoT, drones across operations

cases.tacit_notes: Reduced lifting costs by ~5%. State-owned with strong mandate makes execution easier than at peers.

transformation.description: London IPO + governance modernization + cost discipline

cases.tacit_notes: Quasi-sovereign successfully professionalized post-IPO. World's largest uranium producer.

transformation.description: Mine of the Future - autonomous trucks, trains, drills across Pilbara

cases.tacit_notes: World's largest autonomous mining operation. Operated remotely from Perth. Cost down 13%, safety incidents down 50%.

transformation.description: Build vertically integrated construction tech company - design+factory+build

cases.tacit_notes: SoftBank-funded $2B+. Bankrupt 2021. Lesson: 'Tesla-fy construction' was harder than promised - too many local building codes and labor regimes.

transformation.description: Merge Starwood SPG + Marriott Rewards + Ritz-Carlton into Bonvoy

cases.tacit_notes: Bonvoy data breach was inherited from Starwood. Integration was technically successful but cost trust.

transformation.description: See & Spray, autonomous tractors, JD Operations Center subscription model

cases.tacit_notes: Repositioned as software company that sells tractors. Subscription revenue model gaining traction. Right-to-repair pressure is the main headwind.

transformation.description: Partner with BioNTech to develop mRNA COVID vaccine in 9 months

cases.tacit_notes: Generated $37B in 2021 alone. Outlier success - cannot be repeated without pandemic conditions.

transformation.description: Online ordering, dark stores, supply chain modernization

cases.tacit_notes: CEO change in 2018 reset strategy. Closing gap with X5 but slowly.
